nodes.label: Base node: prep → exec → post lifecycle.
Drives execution from a start node following action edges.
Iterates exec() over a list produced by prep().
Call an LLM via OpenRouter.     Reads OPENROUTER_API_KEY and LLM_MODEL from envi
Extract JSON from LLM output that may be wrapped in markdown fences.
Stage 1 — Analyse the research question.     Outputs: research_goal, key_concept
Stage 2 — Create a structured search / investigation plan.     Outputs: search_q
Stage 3 — Research each sub-question independently (batch).     Outputs: sub_que
Stage 4 — Synthesise all sub-question findings into a coherent narrative.     Ou
